data.title: Pharos Launches Mainnet with High Yield RWA Vault
data.description: Pharos has successfully launched its mainnet, featuring a pAlpha High Yield Real-World Asset (RWA) Vault that has already reached its $50 million capacity. According to NS3.AI, the company anticipates more than 50 applications to deploy at launch. The Atlantic testnet, which preceded the mainnet, processed over 4.3 billion transactions across 209 million wallets in less than a year. Co-founder and CEO Wish Wu emphasized that the network is designed to integrate assets, compliance, privacy, and applications within a single environment tailored for real-world assets.

data.title: MARA launched the MARA Foundation to improve Bitcoin security and expand self-custody and educational resources.
data.description: MARA has launched the MARA Foundation to enhance Bitcoin's resilience against security threats, including risks such as quantum computing, while also expanding the accessibility of self-custody and providing educational resources. (Bitcoin News)

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. WTI crude oil touched $102/barrel, a new high since April 13; 2. Spot gold fell below the $4,600 mark; 3. Polymarket is undergoing a coordinated upgrade of its exchange stack, expected to end at 20:00; 4. Bitmine just pledged $214 million worth of ETH; 5. Data: Binance's stablecoin inflows exceeded $6 billion in the past two months; 6. Block Inc. increased its holdings by 114.89 Bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 8,998; 7. Crypto hackers have stolen a total of $17.1 billion in assets over the past decade; 8. Galaxy Digital OTC-linked addresses transferred over 20,000 ETH to exchanges within 24 hours; 9. Iranian Ministry of Defense: The US must stop its "illegal demands"; 10. Bitcoin mining company Core Scientific is investing heavily in transforming into an AI data center, advancing a 1.5GW data center project.

data.title: Israel approves its first regulated stablecoin pegged to the shekel.
data.description: The Israel Capital Markets Authority has approved Bits of Gold's issuance of BILS, the country's first stablecoin pegged to the shekel. This token is a regulated asset launched by Bits of Gold after a two-year evaluation and pilot program, with support from the Solana Network, Fireblocks, and Ernst & Young. Bits of Gold stated that bringing the shekel onto the blockchain aims to place it alongside currencies already integrated into the blockchain financial system, such as the euro, yen, and Singapore dollar. With the stablecoin market currently exceeding $300 billion, this issuance aims to counter the dominance of dollar-pegged tokens in on-chain payments and uphold digital sovereignty.

data.title: WTI crude oil touched $102 per barrel, a new high since April 13.
data.description: Gate data shows that WTI crude oil touched $102 per barrel, a new high since April 13. Brent crude oil is currently trading at $104.27 per barrel, up 2.37%.

data.title: Spot gold fell below the $4,600 mark.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold fell below $4,600 per ounce for the first time since April 2, with a daily drop of 1.75%.

data.title: Five newly created wallets withdrew over 350,000 DEXE tokens from Binance.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, four newly created wallets withdrew 353,893 DEXE tokens from Binance, worth $5.3 million. Currently, the nine newly created wallets collectively hold 865,911 DEXE tokens, worth $13.06 million.

data.title: Spark's Q1 2026 Financial Report: Revenue Decline but Profitability Maintained
data.description: Spark's financial report for the first quarter of 2026 reveals a decline in revenue, yet the company remains profitable. According to PANews, the stablecoin USDS distribution business has surpassed lending to become the core engine of the company. This shift highlights Spark's strategic transition from a DeFi protocol to an asset management platform.

data.title: Polymarket Announces Exchange Stack Upgrade
data.description: Polymarket is undergoing a coordinated upgrade of its exchange stack, according to Odaily. The upgrade includes new smart contracts, a rewritten order book, and new collateral tokens. Trading will be paused for approximately one hour during the switch, expected to last until around 20:00 UTC+8.

data.title: Spain's Economy Minister: GDP Growth Expected to Reach 2.2% This Year
data.description: Spain's Economy Minister has announced that the country's GDP growth is expected to reach 2.2% this year, maintaining the same forecast as previously projected. According to Jin10, this aligns with earlier predictions and reflects the government's outlook for economic performance in 2026.

data.title: Bitmine just staked $214 million worth of ETH.
data.description: According to Arkham, Bitmine has just staked $214 million worth of ETH; Bitmine currently holds a total of $8.45 billion worth of staked ETH, representing 9.5% of all staked ETH on the network.

data.title: Polymarket is undergoing a coordinated upgrade of its exchange stack, which is expected to end at 20:00.
data.description: According to official sources, Polymarket is undergoing a coordinated upgrade of its exchange stack, including new smart contracts, a rewritten order book, and new collateral tokens. Trading will be suspended for approximately one hour during the switchover (until approximately 20:00 UTC+8).

data.title: Italy Urged to Monitor Spending Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: Italy must carefully manage its spending to adhere to European Union fiscal rules, according to Andrea Brandolini, an official from the Bank of Italy. Bloomberg posted on X that Brandolini emphasized the importance of fiscal discipline in light of the country's deteriorating economic growth outlook. The warning comes as Italy faces increasing pressure to balance its budget while navigating economic uncertainties. Brandolini's remarks highlight the challenges Italy faces in maintaining fiscal stability within the EU framework. The Bank of Italy continues to monitor the situation closely, urging the government to prioritize prudent financial management.

data.title: Global Markets Remain Unfazed by Iran Conflict
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that Asia equities reporter Winnie Yu and markets reporter Ruth Carson discussed on the Big Take podcast why global markets are currently overlooking the ongoing conflict in Iran. They explained to host Sarah Holder that while the situation in Iran has not significantly impacted market trends, this could change depending on future developments. Investors are advised to stay informed as geopolitical tensions may eventually influence market dynamics.

data.title: Proposed Bitcoin Hard Fork in August 2026 to Introduce eCash
data.description: Paul Sztorc has announced a proposed Bitcoin hard fork set for August 2026 at block 964,000, which would provide holders with 1 eCash for each 1 BTC. According to NS3.AI, while BTC balances will remain on the Bitcoin mainnet, the final launch software, replay rules, and coin-splitting tools are still pending verification. The proposal currently lacks support from major miners, exchanges, custodians, and wallets, raising concerns about liquidity and usability.

data.title: Spain's Economy Minister Projects 2026 Budget Deficit at 1.6% of GDP
data.description: Spain's Economy Minister has projected that the country's budget deficit for this year will be 1.6% of its GDP, excluding one-time expenditures. According to Jin10, this forecast reflects the government's ongoing efforts to manage fiscal policy amid economic challenges. The minister emphasized the importance of maintaining fiscal discipline while addressing various economic priorities.

data.title: Data: Over $6 billion in stablecoin inflows into Binance over the past two months.
data.description: According to Cryptoquant data, Binance saw a total inflow of over $6 billion in stablecoins in the past two months.

data.title: Block Inc Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Additional Purchase
data.description: Block Inc, led by Jack Dorsey, has acquired an additional 114.89 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 8,998 bitcoins. According to Odaily, this acquisition places Block Inc at the 14th position on the Bitcoin 100 list.

data.title: Block Inc increased its holdings by 114.89 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 8,998 bitcoins.
data.description: Jack Dorsey's Block Inc ($XYZ) purchased an additional 114.89 Bitcoins, bringing his total holdings to 8,998. This places him at number 14 on the Bitcoin 100 list. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Launch: Changelly and Tonkeeper Enable Cross-Chain Deposits into TON
data.description: Changelly and Tonkeeper have introduced a new feature allowing in-wallet cross-chain deposits into the TON network from 13 different networks. According to NS3.AI, this integration enables users to fund their Tonkeeper wallets with USDT, USDC, or DAI directly within the app, enhancing user convenience and streamlining the process.
